about.metaTitle: About — Xplania, travel differently at last
about.metaDescription: Xplania centralizes the entire travel experience: before, during and after. Discover the story and vision behind the platform.
about.heroSubtitle: We spend more time managing a trip than actually living it. I'd had enough. So I built Xplania.

trigger.body1: Before a trip to the Canary Islands, I found myself with 9 tabs open: packing list, budget, visa, places, weather, culture, transport, souvenirs, and a WhatsApp group going in every direction. I spent more time planning than actually going.
trigger.body2: That day I realized the problem wasn't me — it was the absence of a tool that truly brings everything together.
trigger.body3: Xplania is the answer to that frustration.
trigger.quote: Travel should begin when you put your suitcase down — not when you start packing it.

pip.title: Pip, your travel companion
pip.body: Pip isn't just a logo. He's the embodiment of what Xplania stands for: curious, adventurous, always ready for the next discovery. Like you, Pip doesn't travel to tick boxes — he travels to feel something.
pip.alt: Pip, Xplania's penguin mascot, with his backpack and compass

vision.statement: One day, planning a trip will take 10 minutes. And you'll never forget why you left in the first place.

items.title: First reflections
items.desc: Early research on the travel experience and traveler frustrations.

items.title: Beta launch
items.desc: First beta version of Xplania opened to Early Explorers.

items.title: What's next
items.desc: New destinations, new features, a growing community. Xplania is just getting started.

value.title: One platform, the whole experience ✈️
value.body: Xplania is the only platform that centralizes the entire travel experience: before, during and after — all in one place.

experience.title: How it works
experience.subtitle: An experience designed like a journey, not a form.

s1.title: Pick your mood
s1.desc: The app suggests places that match how you feel right now.

s2.title: Explore 🎮
s2.desc: Every spot you visit becomes a point on your personal map.

s3.title: Come back 📖
s3.desc: Your memories turn into an illustrated story, ready to share.

stat3.label: personalized on your preferences and tourism data

founder.title: Behind Xplania, there's Juliette 👋
founder.intro: My name is Juliette, I'm 22 and based in Lille, France. I've always traveled with wide eyes and a full notebook — but with the constant frustration of spending hours organizing what should be simple. Xplania was born from that contradiction: I love traveling, but I hated planning it.
founder.bullet1: Double master's student at the Catholic University of Lille
founder.bullet3: Content creator & Top 5 FR Travel Bloggers
founder.body: Today, she's building Xplania with one ambition: transform the way we live travel.

cta.title: Ready to discover the next generation of travel?
cta.subtitle: Whether you're a traveler, tourism pro or simply curious — join the journey.

hero.forWho: Made for curious travelers who want more than Google Maps: plan, live and tell every step of the journey.

features.title: Everything you need to leave with peace of mind
features.subtitle: Eight AI-powered tools to prepare, live and tell your trip from A to Z

valise.title: Smart packing
valise.tagline: A tailor-made checklist of what to bring.
valise.description: We automatically generate a packing list adapted to your destination, the forecast and the duration of your stay. No more forgotten essentials or overweight bags.

budget.title: Budget guide
budget.tagline: Estimate and track your spending while traveling.
budget.description: We estimate the total cost of your trip based on the country and your travel style, and you track your spending day by day to stay within your plan.
budget.benefit2: Adjust your budget to local cost of living

visa.title: Visa & paperwork guide
visa.tagline: Know exactly which documents to prepare before leaving.
visa.description: We give you the precise list of documents required based on your nationality and destination: visa, passport, vaccines, insurance.
visa.benefit2: Have all required documents on D-day

journal.title: Travel journal
journal.tagline: Document and relive your trip in just a few clicks.
journal.description: Notes, photos, moods and places, day by day. AI turns your memories into an immersive story, exportable as PDF and shareable via public link.
journal.benefit1: Keep an emotional trace of every trip
journal.benefit2: Share your memories with your loved ones

tracking.title: Live trip tracking
tracking.tagline: Your real-time companion during the trip.
tracking.description: Live map, dynamic timeline of stops, automatic check-in on arrival and hyper-local AI suggestions based on your location, weather and mood.
tracking.benefit1: Track your progress and stats live

explore.title: Travel Map
explore.tagline: Your trip becomes an exploration game.
explore.description: Branched interactive map, clickable points, badges to unlock and gamified progression. Every place you visit earns you points and brings you closer to the ultimate Globe Trotter badge.
explore.benefit1: Explore your trip like a living game
explore.benefit2: Unlock badges and points by visiting

mood.title: Mood Explorer
mood.tagline: Pick an emotion, we'll find the perfect spot.
mood.description: You're not looking for a place, you're looking for a feeling. Pick your mood (chill, romantic, food, party…) and get hyper-personalized AI recommendations based on your location, the weather and the time of day.

discover.title: Discover
discover.tagline: The best local spots around you, in real time.
discover.description: Contextual recommendations based on your location, time and weather. Interactive map, hidden gems, natural-language search ('brunch with a view') and personal lists to organize your favorites.
discover.benefit2: Get hidden-gem alerts as you walk

howItWorks.title: How Xplania works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple three-step approach to travel with peace of mind
howItWorks.step1Title: Tell us where you want to go
howItWorks.step1Desc: Destination, dates, travel style: we ask just the right questions — neither too many nor too few.
howItWorks.step2Desc: In seconds, you get your budget, packing list and visa requirements, ready to use.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Travel journal, live tracking, mood explorer and real-time recommendations: everything is already available in the beta.

benefits.subtitle: Xplania isn't just a website, it's your intelligent travel copilot. We remove the mental load of budget, visas and packing so you can focus on what matters: the joy of discovery.
benefits.timeDesc: Stop spending hours digging through contradictory info on visas or budget. Xplania centralizes everything.
benefits.calmDesc: Leave with the certainty you forgot nothing thanks to smart, personalized planning.
benefits.controlDesc: Manage your budget in real time with estimates based on the local cost of living.

beta.subtitle: Join an exclusive community of passionate travelers shaping the future of travel
beta.feedbackDesc: Your input directly improves the product. Every suggestion counts to build the perfect travel tool.
beta.earlyDesc: Discover new features before anyone else and try innovations first-hand.
beta.communityDesc: Join the Early Explorers and help shape the future of intelligent travel.
beta.shareSubtitle: Your feedback is essential to improve Xplania and build the perfect travel tool

guideVisa.title: Visa & Administrative Paperwork
guideVisa.subtitle: The essential info before you leave.
guideVisa.errIncomplete: Incomplete AI response. Please try again.
guideVisa.stepProfile: Xplania is analyzing your traveler profile…
guideVisa.inlineDisclaimer: ℹ️ Always double-check this information on the official embassy website (diplomatie.gouv.fr).

disclaimer.title: ⚠️ Important notice —
disclaimer.body: The information provided by Xplania is for guidance purposes only and may not reflect the latest entry requirements. Always verify with the official French embassy or consulate website for your destination before travelling.

stepper.title: Your visa checklist, made simple 📋
stepper.reassurance: 💬 Not sure about a step? Ask Pip — no question is too basic.

steps.title: Check if you need a visa
steps.detail: Based on your nationality and destination. Most European passports don't need a visa for short EU stays, but it's different elsewhere.

steps.title: Check processing times
steps.detail: Some visas take 4–8 weeks — start early! Student or long-stay visas can take even longer.

steps.title: Gather your documents
steps.detail: Passport valid 6 months after your return, recent ID photos, accommodation and ticket proofs, travel insurance.

steps.title: Submit your application
steps.detail: At the embassy, consulate or online depending on the destination. Many countries now accept 100% online applications (e-visa, ESTA, etc.).

steps.title: Receive your visa and check the dates
steps.detail: Check the number of allowed entries, validity period and expiry date. A mistake can stop you boarding.

steps.title: On arrival: keep your documents handy
steps.detail: Paper + cloud copy of your passport, visa, insurance and bookings. Note the nearest French consulate number.

currencySection.title: 💱 Currency converter — live rates
currencySection.disclaimer: Rates are indicative. They may differ at your bank or currency exchange.

officialCheck.verifiedAria: Information verified at {{time}} against official sources

vaccinesGuide.title: 💉 Vaccines & travel health
vaccinesGuide.subtitle: General recommendations from French health authorities
vaccinesGuide.disclaimer: This is general information. See an international vaccination centre 4–8 weeks before departure for personal advice.
vaccinesGuide.disclaimerWithDest: This is general information for {{destination}}. See an international vaccination centre 4–8 weeks before departure.

blocks.title: Mandatory vaccines
blocks.body: Required at the border by some countries (vaccination certificate needed).
items: Yellow fever — sub-Saharan Africa, tropical South America

blocks.title: Recommended vaccines
blocks.body: Strongly advised depending on destination, length and conditions of stay.

blocks.title: Routine vaccines up to date
blocks.body: Before any trip, make sure your routine vaccines are current.
items: Pertussis, seasonal flu depending on profile

blocks.title: Chemoprophylaxis
blocks.body: Preventive treatment against malaria in risk zones. Discuss with a doctor based on destination and season.
items: Mosquito protection (DEET repellent, treated net, long clothing)
Treatment suited to the zone (Malarone, doxycycline, mefloquine)

safetyGuide.title: 🛡️ Safety & vigilance
safetyGuide.subtitle: General guidance from French authorities (diplomatie.gouv.fr)
safetyGuide.arianeBody: Free service from the French Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs: you receive safety alerts by SMS/email and can be contacted in case of crisis in your destination country.
safetyGuide.disclaimer: Always check the official advisory for your destination before leaving — levels can change quickly.
safetyGuide.disclaimerWithDest: Check the official France-Diplomatie advisory for {{destination}} — levels can change quickly.

levels.label: 🟢 Level 1 — Normal vigilance
levels.description: No particular risk. Standard caution as anywhere else.

levels.label: 🟡 Level 2 — Enhanced vigilance
levels.description: Tensions, crime or health risks requiring more attention.

levels.label: 🟠 Level 3 — Avoid unless essential
levels.description: Travel advised against unless absolutely necessary.

levels.label: 🔴 Level 4 — Strongly discouraged
levels.description: All travel is strongly discouraged for your safety.

risks.title: Pickpockets & theft
risks.body: Airports, public transport, markets. Keep belongings in front and duplicate your documents.

risks.title: Tourist scams
risks.body: Fake taxis, fake guides, fake police. Check prices and use official apps.

risks.title: Natural hazards
risks.body: Cyclones, earthquakes, floods depending on season. Check weather and local alerts.

risks.title: Health risks
risks.body: Water, food, mosquitoes, altitude. Adapt your behaviour to the area.

soloTips: Share your itinerary and accommodation with someone you trust
Share your live location with a trusted contact
Avoid walking alone at night in unfamiliar areas
Keep a digital copy of your documents (cloud + email)
Locate the nearest French consulate as soon as you arrive

1.label: 🟢 Level 1 — Normal vigilance
1.summary: According to French authorities, {{destination}} presents no particular risks for travellers. Stay alert as you would anywhere.

2.label: 🟡 Level 2 — Enhanced vigilance
2.summary: According to French authorities, enhanced vigilance is recommended for {{destination}}. Check the official advisory for details.

3.label: 🟠 Level 3 — Avoid unless necessary
3.summary: According to French authorities, travel to {{destination}} is advised against unless necessary. Check the official advisory before any trip.

4.label: 🔴 Level 4 — Strongly advised against
4.summary: According to French authorities, travel to {{destination}} is strongly discouraged.

solo.title: Travelling solo — what to know
tips: Always share your itinerary and accommodation details with someone you trust
Share your live location with a trusted contact
Check areas to avoid based on official advisories
Note local emergency numbers and the nearest French consulate address
Join solo traveller communities on dedicated forums

chatbot.subtitle: Your visa copilot
chatbot.welcome: Hi! 🌍 Pip here. I'll help you navigate visas, safety tips, and entry requirements — no stress, no jargon. Want me to guide you step by step?

steps.destination: Where are you planning to go? (type a country)
steps.nationality: What's your nationality / which passport are you travelling with?
steps.tripType: What kind of trip is this?
steps.duration: How long are you planning to stay?

chatbot.summary:
Here's what I found for {{destination}} with a {{nationality}} passport, {{duration}}, {{tripType}} 🎉

Ask me anything, or use the shortcuts above to jump to visa process, safety or the embassy.
chatbot.placeholder: Ask anything about visas or entry requirements…
chatbot.errorAnswer: Oops, small glitch on my side. Rephrase and I'll try again 🙏
chatbot.qaEmpty: Ask me anything — visa, safety, paperwork, currency… I'm here.
chatbot.disclaimer: ⚠️ Always verify on the official embassy site before booking.

legal.contactNote: For any question, write to us at

sections.heading: Editor
sections.body:
Xplania is an individual entrepreneurial project created by Juliette Noël, based in Lille, France. No registered legal entity to date.

Contact: juliettenoel.xplania@gmail.com
Publication director: Juliette Noël.

sections.heading: Hosting
sections.body: The site is hosted by Lovable (lovable.dev). For any hosting-related request, users may contact Lovable directly.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.body:
All Xplania content — including texts, the Pip penguin mascot, the Xplania name and logo, visual identity and AI-generated travel recommendations — is the exclusive property of the creator. It is protected under the French Intellectual Property Code (Code de la propriété intellectuelle), which grants the same level of protection as standard copyright law in most jurisdictions.

Any reproduction, representation or reuse without prior written consent is strictly forbidden.

sections.heading: Personal Data
sections.body:
Xplania collects two categories of data:
• your email address, for beta registration and account creation;
• an approximate geolocation, used in real time to personalize destination suggestions — not stored persistently.

Data is collected with your consent. You may access, correct or request deletion of your data at any time by writing to juliettenoel.xplania@gmail.com. Your data is never sold or shared with third parties for commercial purposes. See the Privacy Policy for full details.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: Xplania uses only technical cookies necessary for the site to operate and anonymous analytics cookies. No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are set without explicit consent.

sections.heading: Applicable Law
sections.body: This legal notice is governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, and failing an amicable resolution, the competent courts will be those of Lille, France.

sections.heading: Who is responsible for your data
sections.body:
Xplania is an individual project run by Juliette Noël, based in Lille, France. As data controller, she decides why and how your personal data is used.

Dedicated contact for any question about your personal data: juliettenoel.xplania@gmail.com

sections.heading: Data collected, purposes, legal bases and retention
sections.body:
We keep collection to the strict minimum. Here is exactly what we process:

• Email address and password (account / premium waitlist) — purpose: account creation, authentication, product communication. Legal basis: performance of the contract (GDPR art. 6.1.b) for accounts, consent (art. 6.1.a) for the waitlist. Retention: lifetime of the account + 12 months of inactivity, then deletion. For the waitlist: until launch + 6 months or unsubscription.

• Trip content (destinations, dates, activities, logbook, uploaded photos, live-tracking GPS position) — purpose: power the Planner, Logbook, Live Tracking and Discover modules. Legal basis: performance of the contract. Retention: as long as the account exists; deletion on request or upon account closure.

• Approximate or precise geolocation (only when you enable it) — purpose: nearby suggestions, live GPS tracking. Legal basis: explicit browser consent. Position is stored only if you enable live tracking.

• Messages sent to the AI assistants Pip (visa) and Maya (budget) — purpose: generate a personalized answer. Legal basis: performance of the contract. Retention: up to 30 days for quality purposes, then deletion.

• Feedback sent via the form (rating, suggestions, problems, email) — purpose: product improvement. Legal basis: consent (you submit it voluntarily). Retention: 24 months.

• Anonymous usage analytics (pages, features used) — no personal identifier attached. Legal basis: legitimate interest in improving the service. Retention: 24 months.

sections.heading: Sub-processors and third-party services
sections.body:
To run Xplania we rely on a small number of trusted providers. None of them resells your data. Each one is bound by contract.

1) Lovable Labs Incorporated (United States)
   • Role: no-code platform hosting the website, the app and the Lovable Cloud backend.
   • Data transmitted: all technical data needed to operate the service (account, trip content, logs).
   • Privacy policy: https://lovable.dev/privacy
   • Terms: https://lovable.dev/terms

2) Supabase Inc. (United States)
   • Role: database and authentication hosting (underlying Lovable Cloud).
   • Data transmitted: email, hashed password, trip content, uploaded photos.
   • Privacy policy: https://supabase.com/privacy

3) Google LLC — Gemini API (United States)
   • Role: AI engine used by the Pip (visa guide) and Maya (budget guide) assistants to generate answers.
   • Data transmitted: the content of the message you send to the assistant (destination, travel context). No email or account identifier is transmitted.
   • Gemini API terms: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/terms

4) Google LLC — Workspace / Gmail (United States)
   • Role: receives the emails sent through the feedback and contact forms. The feedback form relies on EmailJS to relay the message to the Xplania team's Gmail inbox.
   • Data transmitted: your email, rating, suggestions, reported problems.
   • Google privacy policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy

This list will be kept up to date. Any meaningful change will be communicated to you.

sections.heading: Data transfers outside the European Union
sections.body:
The providers listed above are based in the United States. Your data may therefore be processed outside the European Union.

These transfers are framed by the safeguards required by the GDPR: European Commission Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) and, where applicable, certification under the EU–US Data Privacy Framework. We give priority to providers that apply these safeguards.

sections.heading: Your GDPR rights and how to exercise them
sections.body:
Under the EU General Data Protection Regulation, you have the following rights over your personal data:

• Right of access — get a copy of what we hold about you.
• Right to rectification — correct inaccurate data.
• Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten") — request deletion of your account and your data.
• Right to portability — receive your data in a readable format.
• Right to object — object to certain processing (e.g. usage analytics).
• Right to restriction — ask to freeze a processing while a check is performed.
• Right to withdraw your consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing carried out before withdrawal.

To exercise any of these rights, email: juliettenoel.xplania@gmail.com and describe your request. You will receive an answer within 30 days at most.

If you feel your rights are not being respected, you can lodge a complaint at any time with the French data protection authority CNIL (equivalent to the ICO or your national DPA): https://www.cnil.fr

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: Xplania only uses technical cookies required for the site to work (session, authentication, language preference) and anonymous analytics cookies. No advertising cookies or third-party marketing trackers are dropped without explicit consent.

sections.heading: Security
sections.body: Exchanges between your browser and Xplania are encrypted over HTTPS. Passwords are stored in hashed form. Access to the data is restricted to the data controller and protected by authentication.

sections.heading: Updates to this policy
sections.body: This policy may evolve (new provider, new feature, regulatory change). Any meaningful change will be notified by email to registered users and the update date above will be updated.

sections.heading: Acceptance
sections.body: By using Xplania, you accept these Terms. The service is currently in beta, as part of the Early Explorers program.

sections.heading: Service description
sections.body: Xplania is an AI-powered travel planning platform. It offers mood-based itineraries, a smart packing assistant, budget guides, gamified travel maps, live tracking and travel journals. Features may evolve freely during the beta.

sections.heading: Beta program
sections.body: The service is provided free of charge during the beta. Xplania may limit access, modify features or discontinue the program at any time, without prior notice. Beta users may be invited to share feedback to help improve the product.

sections.heading: User responsibilities
sections.body: You agree to use Xplania for lawful personal travel planning only. The following are forbidden: reverse engineering, copying the service, sharing your account access, or any unauthorized automated use.

sections.heading: AI content disclaimer
sections.body:
AI-generated recommendations are provided for informational and inspirational purposes only. They do not constitute professional travel advice.

Xplania cannot be held responsible for inaccuracies, changes in local conditions, visa requirements or any travel disruption. You must always verify critical information (visa, health, safety, schedules) through official sources before traveling.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: All Xplania content, visual identity and branding are protected under French law. No reproduction is allowed without prior written consent.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.body: The service is provided "as is" during the beta, without warranty. The creator cannot be held liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from the use of the service.

sections.heading: Modifications
sections.body: These Terms may be updated. Any significant change will be notified by email to registered users. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

sections.heading: Applicable law
sections.body: These Terms are governed by French law. Failing an amicable resolution, the courts of Lille, France, shall have exclusive jurisdiction.

onboarding.title: Pip, your journal companion
onboarding.welcome: Hey! Your {{destination}} journal ({{days}} days) is ready to fill in. 📖✨
onboarding.question: Want me to walk you through the pages and features?

sectionHelp.timeline: You're on the chronological pages. Pick a day on the left, then add blocks: note, photo, location, mood, audio, highlight. The more you log, the richer your {{destination}} journal becomes.
sectionHelp.story: Here the AI turns your blocks into a real travel story. Pick a tone, let the AI choose, or use "My Style" to mimic your own voice.
sectionHelp.insights: Your {{destination}} stats and badges: top locations, dominant moods, happiest day. Add more blocks to unlock more badges.
sectionHelp.docs: Pin tickets, PDFs and receipts to a specific day. Everything stays where it belongs, when you need it.
sectionHelp.share: Turn on the public link, generate 1080×1920 Instagram cards, or export your journal to PDF to keep it forever.

qa.greeting: Hey {{name}}! 👋 I'm Pip, your journal companion for {{destination}}. Want memory ideas, help generating your story, or stuck on a feature? I've got you.

Hi {{name}}! ✨ I'm Pip, your journal buddy. Not sure what to log today for {{destination}}? I'll help.
Hello {{name}} 🌍 Pip speaking. Question on your story, photos, or sharing? Lay it on me.

Hey there {{name}}! 👋 Pip's in. Block ideas, writing prompts, PDF export — just ask.
qa.emptyState: Ask anything about your {{destination}} journal — what to log, how to generate your story, how to share, how to pin a document… I know your journal inside out.

minimaliste.title: Light bag, light mind 🎒
minimaliste.tip: Stick to 5 tops and 2 bottoms that all mix — you can build 10 outfits without bulk. Roll instead of folding, and keep a pouch for dirty laundry.

confort.title: Comfort first ✨
confort.tip: Slip a pashmina shawl into your carry-on: it doubles as a pillow, blanket, and extra layer on planes or in cold restaurants.

stylée.title: Style without compromise 👗
stylée.tip: Pick a 3-colour palette max (e.g. beige, black, white) so everything matches. One pair of dressy shoes is enough if it's versatile.

aventure.title: Ready for the unexpected 🧭
aventure.tip: Favor technical quick-dry fabrics. A headlamp, whistle and compact first-aid kit change everything when things go sideways.

business.title: Sharp and unflappable 💼
business.tip: Roll shirts around a cardboard tube or t-shirt to avoid creases. Keep a suit bag for arrival and a pocket stain-remover handy.

photo.title: Capture every moment 📸
photo.tip: Pack multiple SD cards (3+) rather than one big one — if one fails you don't lose everything. Store spare batteries in a rigid case.

randonnée.title: Light on the trail 🥾
randonnée.tip: Break in your hiking boots before the trip — never a first day in fresh ones. Pack anti-blister socks in double.

plage.title: Sand, sun, calm 🏖️
plage.tip: Bring 2 swimsuits so you can alternate while one dries. A reef-safe SPF50 sunscreen protects both your skin and the coral.

roadtrip.title: The road is yours 🚗
roadtrip.tip: Prep an "easy-access" bag with snacks, car charger, earphones, and sunglasses — no rummaging in the boot at every stop.

urbain.title: At ease in the city 🏙️
urbain.tip: Comfortable shoes are non-negotiable: you'll walk 15–20 km/day. A small anti-pickpocket crossbody bag keeps your papers safe on transit.

luxe.title: Exceptional travel 💎
luxe.tip: A shoe bag and a rigid jewellery pouch make a huge difference. Keep one full backup outfit in carry-on in case your checked bag is delayed.

dress.title: 👗 Dress code
dress.text: Match your outfit to the context (places of worship, upscale restaurants, local markets). When in doubt, cover shoulders and knees. A light scarf in your bag rescues most situations.

customs.title: 🙏 Local customs
customs.text: Observe then mimic: greetings, tipping, queueing, tone of voice. Learning "hello", "thank you", "please" in the local language opens every door.

avoid.title: ⚠️ What to avoid
avoid.text: Don't photograph people without asking, especially children and religious sites. Avoid sensitive political topics and comparisons with your home country.

behavior.title: 💬 Local behaviour
behavior.text: Be patient with the local pace, smile, greet shopkeepers when entering a store. Discretion in public is appreciated almost everywhere.

dress.title: 👗 Dress code
dress.text: Neat and modest. Avoid tank tops/short shorts in temples. Clean intact socks: you'll take your shoes off often (temples, ryokans, some restaurants).

customs.title: 🙏 Local customs
customs.text: Greet with a bow, no cheek kisses. No tipping — it's frowned upon. Hand and receive objects with both hands. Silence in public transport, phones on silent.

avoid.title: ⚠️ What to avoid
avoid.text: Never stick chopsticks upright in rice (funeral ritual). Don't blow your nose in public. No visible tattoos at onsen unless explicitly allowed.

behavior.title: 💬 Local behaviour
behavior.text: Useful words: Konnichiwa (hello), Arigatō (thanks), Sumimasen (excuse me/sorry). Always queue. Sort your own trash.

dress.title: 👗 Dress code
dress.text: Cover shoulders and knees in the medina and religious sites. Prefer linen and light cotton. A scarf is useful (mosques, sun, desert wind).

customs.title: 🙏 Local customs
customs.text: Bargaining is expected (start at ~40% of the asking price), always with a smile. Eat and hand things with the right hand only. Accept mint tea when offered.

avoid.title: ⚠️ What to avoid
avoid.text: Don't photograph people without consent (often paid). Don't enter mosques if you're not Muslim (except Hassan II in Casablanca). Avoid alcohol in public outside hotels.

behavior.title: 💬 Local behaviour
behavior.text: Useful words: Salam (hello), Shukran (thanks), La shukran (no thanks). Be patient with souk solicitations — a firm, smiling "no thanks" is enough.

dress.title: 👗 Dress code
dress.text: Shoulders, stomach and knees covered in temples (mandatory). Remove shoes and hat before entering. Casual elsewhere, but avoid very short outfits in cities.

customs.title: 🙏 Local customs
customs.text: Wai (palms together at chest) to greet. Absolute respect for the royal family and Buddha. Never touch anyone's head, not even a child's.

avoid.title: ⚠️ What to avoid
avoid.text: Don't point feet at a person or a Buddha statue. No criticism of the monarchy (criminal offence). No selfies with your back to a Buddha.

behavior.title: 💬 Local behaviour
behavior.text: Useful words: Sawasdee (hello), Khop khun (thanks), Mai pen rai (no worries). A smile defuses everything. Stay calm — losing face is heavily frowned upon.

dress.title: 👗 Dress code
dress.text: Very casual day-to-day — shorts, flip-flops, t-shirts everywhere. In cities at night, smart-casual at nicer restaurants (no flip-flops). Favor breathable UV-protective fabrics: the sun is harsh.

customs.title: 🙏 Local customs
customs.text: Aussies are direct and warm — call people by first name from the first meeting. The BBQ is sacred: always offer to bring something. Queueing is strictly respected.

avoid.title: ⚠️ What to avoid
avoid.text: Don't joke about Aboriginal peoples or their history. Don't touch or photograph Aboriginal sacred sites without permission. Don't leave food unattended — kookaburras and seagulls literally steal sandwiches.

behavior.title: 💬 Local behaviour
behavior.text: Useful words: G'day (casual hi), No worries, Arvo (afternoon), Brekkie (breakfast), Cheers (thanks/bye). SPF50+ sunscreen daily, even on cloudy days.

casualUrban.title: Casual Urban Look
casualUrban.weatherTip: Perfect in mild weather. Add a light jacket if it gets windy.
casualUrban.culturalTip: All-purpose outfit accepted in most public places.

elegantEvening.title: Elegant Evening Outfit
elegantEvening.weatherTip: Bring a light blazer — evenings can be cool.
elegantEvening.culturalTip: Some restaurants require smart attire. Check before you go.

natureExploration.title: Nature Exploration Look
natureExploration.weatherTip: Layer up to adapt to temperature swings.
natureExploration.culturalTip: Some natural sites require covered shoulders and knees.

beachRelax.title: Beach & Chill Look
beachRelax.weatherTip: SPF 50 sunscreen is a must. Stay hydrated.
beachRelax.culturalTip: Topless isn't allowed everywhere. Check local customs.

businessTravel.title: Business Travel Look
businessTravel.weatherTip: Conference rooms are often air-conditioned — bring a layer.
businessTravel.culturalTip: In some countries, business cards are exchanged with both hands.

budget.alertsSubtitle: AI watches your spending and suggests fixes
budget.tipsSubtitle: Practical tips to travel smart and save

local.d: Eat local to cut costs and discover real cuisine at your destination.

transit.d: Use public transit instead of taxis to save up to 70%.

museum.d: Visit free museums on Mondays or take advantage of free-entry days.

lastMin.d: Book some activities the day before to get up to 30% off.

shop.d: Buy souvenirs at local markets rather than tourist hotspots.

breakfast.d: Pick a stay with breakfast included to save on meals.

walk.d: Join free walking tours (tip-based) to explore without breaking the bank.

pass.d: Buy a city pass if you plan to visit several paid attractions.

genSteps.s2: Xplania is computing your optimal budget…

savingTipsFallback.transportBody: In {{destination}}, always compare day or weekly transit passes before buying single tickets one by one.
savingTipsFallback.foodBody: Look for markets, bakeries and small neighborhood canteens in {{destination}} instead of streets right next to major sights.
savingTipsFallback.activitiesBody: Before booking, check free museums, viewpoints, parks and walking tours in {{destination}} — they can often fill half a day without touching your budget.
savingTipsFallback.extrasBody: Set aside a small buffer for surprises in {{destination}} so you do not have to cut back on meals or key activities.

onboarding.title: Pip, your budget copilot
onboarding.welcome: Hi! Your budget for {{destination}} ({{days}} days) is ready. 🎉
onboarding.question: Want me to walk you through the features?
onboarding.suggestion: Great! Start with your detailed forecast for {{destination}} — every line is editable and the AI suggests amounts matched to local cost of living.

sectionHelp.analysis: Here, you can edit the estimated total budget for {{destination}}. Xplania then redistributes that amount across categories so the rest of the guide updates.
sectionHelp.forecast: You are in the forecast: click any line amount to adjust it, or accept an AI suggestion if it better fits your trip.
sectionHelp.tracker: Here, you compare your planned budget with real expenses. Add an expense and the remaining budget updates automatically.
sectionHelp.charts: These charts turn your expenses into trends: planned vs spent, daily rhythm and overspending risk.
sectionHelp.tips: These tips are tied to {{destination}} and your current budget. Refresh them if you significantly change your budget.

testimonials.title: What early explorers are saying
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from beta testers — picked for their honesty.

t1.name: Kajinoma
t1.text: Honestly I think it's perfect, it's truly a brilliant idea. Zero problems during testing.

t2.name: Victor Vaas
t2.text: Works perfectly. I'd love to see a 'speed' version of the planner, and even more images in the generated guide.

t3.name: Mélanie Garnier
t3.text: I really liked that she talked about how much time we spend looking for travel info. I totally relate to the idea that everything is scattered and ends up being more tiring than enjoyable.

t4.name: Tiphaine Letourneur
t4.text: Really great. I'd love to see even more place suggestions and weather refined by region or city.

t5.name: Deeruven Sobaroyen
t5.text: I love the concept of your app, never seen anything like it! You're offering a solution that cuts down both the planning time and the mental load that comes with it — it can only be beneficial.

t6.name: Shivdeep Singh
t6.text: Interesting concept — positioning Xplania as a 'travel co-pilot' and focusing on the preparation phase (budget, visa, luggage) is a smart angle. Most platforms only tackle booking, so addressing the prep stage is genuinely relevant.

faq.title: Everything you're wondering
faq.subtitle: Clear answers to the questions we get most often.

q1.a: Yes. You get 3 free trip generations to try every tool. No card required, no commitment. Paid packs arrive at public launch for heavier use.

q2.q: What does the AI actually do?
q2.a: Saves you hours: it analyzes your destination, profile and preferences to generate a tailored packing list, realistic budget, local activities, visa tips, a travel story… Everything is personalized, never generic.

q3.a: Yes. EU hosting, standard encryption, no resale to third parties. You can delete your account and all your data at any time from your profile.

q4.a: Offline mode is currently in development: it will let you access your journal, tracking map and steps even without signal, with automatic sync when wifi returns. Coming soon.

q5.q: Can I share my trip with friends and family?
q5.a: Yes, for free. Public journal via link, real-time tracking share, PDF export — you choose what to make visible and to whom.

q6.a: Premium plans are scheduled for late 2026 / early 2027. Join the premium list to get early access and an exclusive launch discount reserved for beta explorers.

exitIntent.title: Before you go…
exitIntent.subtitle: Grab our ultimate pre-departure checklist. Free, instant, printable.
exitIntent.bullet1: Documents, health, suitcase, home — nothing forgotten
exitIntent.bullet2: A4 PDF, 5 categories, 30+ items to tick off
exitIntent.bullet3: Bonus: we'll send our best travel tips by email too
exitIntent.privacy: No spam. Unsubscribe in one click.
exitIntent.doneSubtitle: Your checklist is downloading. Have a great trip!

currency.title: Currency converter
currency.unavailable: Rates temporarily unavailable — try again in a moment.
currency.disclaimer: Rates are indicative and may differ at your bank or currency exchange.

tripRecap.title: Well done, {{destination}} is in the bag!

shareDialog.title: Share my journal
shareDialog.description: Enable public sharing and send the link to anyone.
shareDialog.publicHint: Anyone with the link can view it
shareDialog.ogHint: This is the image shown on social networks
shareDialog.emailBody: Hi! Check out my travel journal on Xplania:

addNode.title: Add a trip stop
addNode.desc: Write your route yourself, no AI needed — every stop adds points and unlocks badges.
addNode.namePh: E.g. Café de Flore, Sunset at Sacré-Cœur…
addNode.descPh: A note, a feeling, a detail to remember…

suggestions.title: AI suggestions
suggestions.empty: Run AI to discover local places to add to your route.

replay.empty: Visit places to replay your trip as a metro line ✨

summary.title: Trip summary
summary.intro: Generate a personalized story from your visited places, badges and memories.

map.noGeoLine2: Use the Mind-map view to explore the branches.

j2.bestMoment: The best moment of this day…
j2.aiNeedWords: Write at least a few words before AI enrichment
j2.aiHint: AI turns your memories into an immersive story. Pick a tone and let the magic happen.
j2.manualHint: Write your story yourself, your way. Your words, your rhythm.
j2.manualPlaceholder: Once upon a time, my trip to…
j2.publicHint: Anyone with the link can view it
j2.exportHint: Create a memory book of your trip, ready to print or archive.
j2.aiToneHint: AI turns your memories into an immersive story. Pick a tone and let the magic happen.
j2.aiAutoHint: AI analyses what you've already written (notes, stories) to match your own style — vocabulary, sentence length, tone.
j2.styleNotEnough: Not enough text yet to capture your style — a generic tone will be used.

x2.addStepDesc: Write your own journey, no AI needed — each step adds points and unlocks badges.
x2.stepPlaceholder: Ex: Café de Flore, Sunset at Sacré-Cœur…
x2.memoryDescPlaceholder: A note, a feeling, a detail to remember…
x2.suggestHint: Run AI to discover local places to add to your journey.
x2.noVisited: Visit places to replay your journey as a metro line ✨
x2.summaryHint: Generate a personalized story of your trip from your visited places, badges and memories.
x2.useMindmap: Use the Mind-map view to explore branches.

tripDocs.title: Trip documents
tripDocs.hint: Store your tickets, passport, bookings (PDF or images, max 10 MB). You can also pin them to a specific journal page.
tripDocs.empty: No documents for this trip yet. Add your tickets or bookings!
tripDocs.emptyPage: No documents pinned to this page yet.
tripDocs.deleteDesc: The file "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted.

pip.title: Pip — your companion
pip.welcome: Hi! Tell me what you need — I'll point you to the right tool, or we can just chat.

suiviAlerts.title: Trip alerts
suiviAlerts.empty: No alerts yet. Click Refresh to check.

sub.title: Alert subscription
sub.desc: Pick the channels and categories of alerts for this trip. Emails are strictly transactional (related to your trip).
sub.transactionalNote: SMS not available — in-app and transactional emails only.
sub.emailRequired: Provide an email for this channel

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, preferences and privacy.
settings.accountSoon: Account management (email change, linked accounts) — coming soon.
settings.notificationsSoon: Detailed preferences (email, push, frequency) — coming soon.
settings.securitySoon: Password, active sessions, two-factor authentication — coming soon.
settings.dataSoon: GDPR export and account deletion — coming soon.

password.title: Password
password.hint: Pick a password with at least 8 characters. You'll be asked for your current one to confirm.

email.title: Email address
email.hint: Current address: {{email}}. A confirmation email will be sent to the new address.
email.success: Confirmation email sent. Check the new inbox.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.hint: Sign out from every device and browser. You'll need to sign back in here.

linked.title: Linked accounts
linked.hint: Connect extra providers to sign in with a click.
linked.lastWarn: You can't unlink your last sign-in method.

inApp.title: In-app notifications
inApp.hint: Pick what shows up in the bell.

email.title: Emails
email.hint: Transactional emails (security, trip alerts) are always sent.

push.title: Browser notifications
push.hint: Get notified even when Xplania isn't open.
push.unsupported: This browser does not support notifications.

badgesValidated.title: Validated badges
badgesValidated.hint: When one of your badges is validated by a moderator.

badgesRejected.title: Rejected claims
badgesRejected.hint: When a badge proof is rejected, with the reason.

tripAlerts.title: Trip alerts
tripAlerts.hint: Weather, safety and events for your ongoing trips.

weeklyDigest.title: Weekly digest
weeklyDigest.hint: A weekly email with your badges and stats.

marketing.title: Xplania updates
marketing.hint: Product news and travel tips. You can unsubscribe anytime.

export.title: Export my data
export.hint: Download all of your personal data as JSON, in line with GDPR.

delete.title: Delete my account
delete.hint: This action is permanent. Your account, trips, badges and journals will be deleted. You can export your data above first.
delete.confirmDesc: This action is irreversible. All your data will be deleted immediately.
